zh.lifeSummary: 當Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat於1203年7月出生在義大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞卡薩爾 蒙福拉托時，他的父親William VI Marquess of Montferrat30歲，母親Berta di Clavesana21歲。他和Margueritte de Savoie至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1253年6月12日在義大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂蒙卡爾福享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat于1203年7月出生在意大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞卡薩爾 蒙福拉托时，他的父亲William VI Marquess of Montferrat30岁，母亲Berta di Clavesana21岁。他和Margueritte de Savoie至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1253年6月12日在意大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂蒙卡爾福享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boniface
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Bonifatius, derived from bonum ‘good’ + fatum ‘fate’. In the early Middle Ages the name came to be alternatively written as Bonifacius (with the same pronunciation) and reanalysed as a compound of bonum + facere ‘to do’, i.e. ‘doer of good deeds’. The name was borne by several early saints, including a 7th-century pope and an Anglo-Saxon missionary who evangelized extensively in Germany in the 8th century. The latter was originally named Winfrid, but took the name Bonifacius on entering holy orders.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat was born in July 1203, in Casale Monferrato, Alessandria, Piedmont, Italy, his father, William VI Marquess of Montferrat, was 30 and his mother, Berta di Clavesana, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Margueritte de Savoie. He died on 12 June 1253, in Moncalvo, Asti, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat est né en juillet 1203, à Casale Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italie, son père, William VI Marquess of Montferrat, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Berta di Clavesana, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Margueritte de Savoie. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1253, à Moncalvo, Asti, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat im Juli 1203 in Casale Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater William VI Marquess of Montferrat 30 und seine Mutter Berta di Clavesana 21. Er hatte mit Margueritte de Savoie mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1253 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Moncalvo, Asti, Piemonte, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat è nato il nel luglio 1203 nel Casale Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, William VI Marquess of Montferrat, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Berta di Clavesana, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Margueritte de Savoie. Morì il 12 giugno 1253, nel Moncalvo, Asti, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Moncalvo, Asti, Piedmont, Italy: イタリアピエモントアスティモンカルボ

ja.lifeSummary: Boniface II Marquess of Montferratが1203年7月にイタリアピエモントアレッサンドリアカサル モンフエラトーで生まれた時，父William VI Marquess of Montferratは30歳，母Berta di Clavesanaは21歳であった。彼はMargueritte de Savoieとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1253年6月12日にイタリアピエモントアスティモンカルボで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat(이)가 1203년 7월 이탈리아 피몽 알레산드리아 카세일 몬페라토에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William VI Marquess of Montferrat(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Berta di Clavesana(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Margueritte de Savoie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 6월 12일 이탈리아 피몽 애스티 몬캘보에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Juli 1203–12 June 1253: 1203 оны Долоодугаар сар–1253 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 12

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat nasceu em julho de 1203, em Casale Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, William VI Marquess of Montferrat, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Berta di Clavesana, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Margueritte de Savoie. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1253, em Moncalvo, Asti, Piemonte, Itália, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat родился июль 1203 г. в местности касеил монфиррато, алессэндря, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени William VI Marquess of Montferrat было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Berta di Clavesana, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Margueritte de Savoie. Он умер 12 июня 1253 г. в местности монкалво, асти, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 49 лет.

sm.from 1225 to 1253: mai le 1225 e o'o I le 1253

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat nació en julio de 1203, en Casale Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, William VI Marquess of Montferrat, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Berta di Clavesana, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Margueritte de Savoie. Murió el 12 de junio de 1253, en Moncalvo, Asti, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 49 años.
